description: Style NoteCrush-worthy colouring in this oh-so-cute flip flop style sandal from catwalk. Wear this with matching kurtas or tops and look great either way!Product DescriptionSmooth footbed with a floral thong strap, a fore strap and an ankle strap with a buckle closureBranding embossed on a heel patch TPU out sole and a small floral lug at the heelMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
